title: MOTOR-77881 — Formal repair assessment & quote — Box Hill Smash Repairs (Aisha Khan, RAV4 1AX-7DQ)
content: Formal repair assessment Q-BHSR-2026-05-07-1842 issued by Box Hill Smash Repairs (Zava-approved panel repairer, ABN 42 118 220 117) for Aisha Khan's 2022 Toyota RAV4 GXL, registration 1AX-7DQ, VIN JTMRWRFV80D061188, odometer 38,420 km. Inspection conducted 2026-05-07 09:30. Scope of damage confirmed: (1) rear bumper assembly — cracked outer skin, paint transfer, broken inner reinforcement bar — supply OEM replacement and repaint AUD 1,940; (2) tailgate panel — vertical dent and mis-alignment to rear quarters, hinges sound — panel beat, fill, prime and full repaint AUD 1,180; (3) tailgate trim and reverse-camera assembly — replace AUD 410; (4) latent boot-floor deformation — confirmed on hoist inspection, ~6mm deflection over the cross-member; chassis-pull and weld-on repair AUD 1,420; (5) parking-sensor harness pinched, replace AUD 220; sundries, paint, materials and labour AUD 830. Total ex-GST AUD 6,000. GST AUD 600. TOTAL QUOTE AUD 6,600. Quote validity 30 days. Estimated repair turnaround 7 business days from authorisation. Vehicle currently drivable; no safety defect. Quote satisfies the M1.1 / M1.4 evidence requirement on the MOTOR-77881 schedule. Recommended hire-car class under M2.2: similar mid-SUV (RAV4 / CX-5 / Tucson) at panel rate AUD 89/day — within the AUD 95/day sub-limit.
